title: micromeria cristata subsp. phrygia
intro: Micromeria cristata subsp. phrygia, also known as Phrygian mint or Phrygian thyme, is a subspecies of Micromeria cristata, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria cristata subsp. phrygia include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-anxiety properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for its medicinal and culinary uses.
